name: ICD Coding — Mitral Valve Disorder + Iatrogenic Pneumothorax
description: Level 3 — MIMIC hadm 28324362 — 4 diagnoses with procedural complication coding
prompt: Patient: Male, 28 years old. Elective admission for cardiac procedure. History of mitral valve disorder. Post-procedure complication: iatrogenic pneumothorax. Labs: WBC 19,200 (elevated), INR 1.2, glucose 199 mg/dL, pO2 286 mmHg (on supplemental O2), fibrinogen 107 mg/dL (low), potassium 5.5, bicarbonate 34. Diagnoses: Mitral valve disorders, Iatrogenic pneumothorax, Flatulence/gas pain, Other postprocedural status. Assign the appropriate ICD-10-CM code(s).
